candidate_r_paradigms.primary_existing_raw_anchor: raw 124 (distributed Byzantine consensus — fault model, strategic rationality 부재) + raw 109 (adversarial co-evolution — external attacker, internal strategic player 부재)
candidate_r_paradigms.raw_126_self_host_stability_declaration: k_step_byte_eq_witness=N/A (Nash eq 의 byte-eq 부적합); k_step_classifier_pass_witness=YES (equilibrium-existence proof selftest k=2 — 2 round simulation); divergence_tolerance_if_unbounded=allowed-mixed-strategy-equilibrium (no pure NE 시 mixed NE 허용); n_step_general_bound=O(N²) for 2-player Nash compute via Lemke-Howson; fixpoint_or_oscillation_classification=fixpoint (Nash) OR best-response-cycle-known-bounded
realization_channels: VCG-style truth-revealing auction for code review
candidate_r_paradigms.counter_example_where_not_applicable: single-agent design (no strategic interaction); pure cooperative team (utility alignment trivial)

candidate_r_paradigms.novel_contribution_vs_46_126_family: raw 118 (recursive self-app fixpoint) 는 SAME-OPERATION iteration fixpoint. R2 는 SCALE-COARSE-GRAINING fixpoint — Wilson RG flow 의 fixed point 는 scale 변화에도 invariant 인 phenomenology. raw 125 hierarchical-temporal 은 multi-scale BUT 각 scale 별 invariant 만 — RG flow 자체의 fixed point 분석 부재. raw 122 persistent-homology 는 metric scale-filtration BUT topological invariant — coupling-constant flow 부재.
candidate_r_paradigms.primary_mechanism: design 의 microscopic parameters {g_i}; coarse-graining transformation T (block-spin / Kadanoff): {g_i'} = T({g_i}); RG flow 의 fixed point g* = T(g*); critical-exponent η, ν, β 추출; universality class 분류 (다른 micro 모델이 동일 fixed point 로 flow → same large-scale behavior).
candidate_r_paradigms.primary_existing_raw_anchor: raw 118 (recursive self-app — same-op iteration, scale-coarse-graining 부재) + raw 125 (hierarchical-temporal — multi-scale, RG flow 부재) + raw 122 (persistent homology — topological scale filtration, coupling flow 부재)
